news.headline: Alex Cooper talks 'Call Her Daddy' and Unwell Hydration Drink at DealBook Summit: "I'm just a girl sharing online," she said.
news.summary: During the DealBook Summit, Ms. Cooper expressed her indifference to how people label her, whether as a journalist, podcaster, or simply a woman who shares her thoughts online regularly.

news.headline: Fox News commentator Kelly Powers, 45, shares glioblastoma battle with viewers before her passing. Raised cancer research awareness.
news.summary: In 2020, she was diagnosed with glioblastoma, a particularly aggressive type of brain cancer. Despite this challenging diagnosis, she utilized her platform to raise awareness about the importance of cancer research.

news.headline: Crescent Energy priced $400 million in 7.625% Senior Notes due 2032 in a private placement, expanding the offering.
news.summary: Houston-based Crescent Energy Company (NYSE: CRGY) has revealed that its subsidiary Crescent Energy Finance LLC has successfully priced a private placement of $400 million aggregate principal amount of 7.625% Senior Notes due 2032. The issuance, conducted under Rule 144A and Regulation S of the Securities Act of 1933, targeted eligible purchasers. The newly issued Additional Notes complement the Existing Notes within the company's financial portfolio.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency market sees Bitcoin nearly hit $100,000, while Ethereum and Dogecoin prices surge in tandem.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the price of Bitcoin approached $100,000, coming within a few hundred dollars of the milestone. Alongside this, other cryptocurrencies such as Ethereum (ETH) and Dogecoin (DOGE) experienced an increase in value.

news.headline: Applus+ partners with Abyss Solutions in Australia to revolutionize Non-Destructive Testing with AI. #Innovation #Partnership
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Houston, Applus+, a prominent company in the Inspection, Testing, and Certification industry, unveiled a significant collaboration with Abyss Solutions, a leading provider of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and machine-learning solutions. This partnership aims to enhance their capabilities by leveraging Abyss Solutions’ expertise in AI. The specifics of the partnership were not disclosed in the report.

news.headline: Dr. Jennifer Bauwens of FRC spoke in support of TN's SB 1 at SCOTUS rally on Dec 4, 2024.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, Dr. Jennifer Bauwens, the Director of the Center for Family Studies at the Family Research Council, addressed a crowd gathered in front of the U.S. Supreme Court in Washington. She voiced support for Tennessee's Senate Bill 1 (SB 1), emphasizing its importance as a practical safeguard. This bill has garnered significant attention for its potential impact on family-related issues, reflecting growing concerns within the community.

news.headline: FNB Corporation prices $500 million senior notes offering due 2030.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based F.N.B. Corporation (NYSE: FNB) revealed on December 4, 2024, that it has set the price for its issuance of $500 million in total principal value of its senior notes. The fixed rate / floating rate notes, which will mature in 2030, will accrue interest at...

news.headline: Immersion cooling market to increase by $988 million by 2028, fueled by AI and data center investments - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the influence of artificial intelligence on market trends projects significant growth in the global immersion cooling market. Estimated to increase by USD 988 million between 2024-2028, the market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 28.62% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: US State Department issues updated advisory for travel to Northern Israel
Dallas College launches Bitcoin Mining Certification program to meet demand in cryptocurrency mining industry.
news.summary: Dallas College has introduced a new Bitcoin Mining Certification program on December 4, 2024, catering to the increasing need for proficient individuals in the cryptocurrency mining sector. This innovative program aims to equip participants with the necessary skills and knowledge for the industry. The certification is a response to the surging demand for trained professionals in cryptocurrency mining and seeks to support aspiring entrepreneurs and individuals interested in mining activities at home.

news.headline: Ryan Seacrest Foundation chooses Nicklaus Children's Hospital for new Seacrest Studio, offering media opportunities for patients.
news.summary: A media center has been established at Nicklaus Children's Hospital to offer patients and their families a platform to engage with radio, TV, and news media. On December 4, 2024, in Miami, the hospital was chosen by the Ryan Seacrest Foundation (RSF) for this initiative.

news.headline: Brady Corp shareholders elect board of directors and approve regular dividend. Unanimously vote in favor of director nominees.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, Brady Corporation (NYSE: BRC) revealed that shareholders of the Company’s Class B Common Voting Stock supported the election of director nominees to a one-year term with a unanimous vote at the annual meeting in Milwaukee.

news.headline: Global Generative AI Market to grow by USD 97.75B (2024-2028) driven by demand for AI content, with CAGR of 50.22% - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing market trends with the use of artificial intelligence reveals substantial growth in the global generative AI market. It is projected to increase by approximately USD 97.75 billion between 2024 and 2028 as indicated by Technavio. The market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 50.22% during this period.

news.headline: Global Managed Detection and Response Services Market to expand by USD 6.2 billion (2024-2028) with AI leading transformation.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the influence of AI on market patterns indicates significant growth in the global managed detection and response services sector. Experts from Technavio project a substantial increase of USD 6.2 billion in market size from 2024 to 2028. The sector is anticipated to exhibit a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 23.58% throughout this period.

news.headline: Smart Buildings Market to reach USD 64.84 billion (2024-2028) due to AI, automation needs - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report on the impact of AI on market dynamics, it has been projected that the global smart buildings market will experience substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 64.84 billion expected from 2024 to 2028. The market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 10.61% throughout this period.

news.headline: Flow Battery Market to grow $954.8M (2024-2028) due to AI and renewable energy storage demand - Technavio.
news.summary: Recently, it was reported that artificial intelligence is significantly influencing market dynamics. According to Technavio, the global flow battery market is anticipated to increase by approximately USD 954.8 million between 2024 and 2028. This market segment is projected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 29.52% throughout the forecasted period.

news.headline: Property management market to grow by USD 11.3 billion (2024-2028) due to industry regulations compliance and AI impact - Technavio.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, a report utilizing AI for market analysis revealed significant insights. The global property management sector is anticipated to witness a substantial increase, with an estimated growth of USD 11.3 billion expected between 2024 and 2028, as indicated by Technavio. During this forecast period, the market is projected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.81%.

news.headline: Health insurance executive Brian Thompson has passed away at the age of 50. He was praised for touching the lives of many.
news.summary: The CEO of UnitedHealth Group described him as an exceptional individual who impacted numerous individuals' lives.

news.headline: Family of journalist Austin Tice to hold news conference after Dec. 6 WH meeting. Event by Press Freedom Center.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Washington, a news conference will be held featuring the family of journalist Austin Tice, who is currently being held in Syria. This event is organized by the National Press Club's Press Freedom Center. The Tice family has been asked to participate in order to address the situation.

news.headline: Location-Based Services Market to surge by $296.3 billion (2024-2028) due to navigation service demand; AI-driven market evolution reported.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on market dynamics. The global market size for location-based services (LBS) is projected to increase by a substantial USD 296.3 billion between 2024 and 2028, as stated by Technavio. The market is expected to experience a notable compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 32.77% during this period.

news.headline: Montgomery Capital Partners III, LP to auction personal property of P3 Pure LLC via public sale, conducted telephonically.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Dallas, an event will take place regarding the Uniform Commercial Code Section 9-610. Montgomery Capital Partners III, LP, acting as the Secured Party, is set to host a public sale where the highest bidder will have the opportunity to purchase secured assets for cash. The sale will be conducted via telephone, with a reserve price in place. This event marks an important opportunity for interested parties to participate and potentially acquire valuable assets.

news.headline: AGF's AUM and fee-earning assets hit $53.6 billion in November 2024.
news.summary: As of November 30, 2024, AGF Management Limited announced that their total assets under management (AUM) and fee-earning assets stood at $53.6 billion. This financial update was released from Toronto on December 4, 2024.

news.headline: SonarX partners with Amazon to bring on-chain datasets to AWS, collaborating with Base, Arbitrum, and others. Data available in AWS S3 buckets.
news.summary: SonarX recently revealed its collaboration with Amazon.com, Inc.'s Amazon Web Services, as well as Base, Arbitrum, Provenance Blockchain, Aptos, and Ripple teams. This partnership aims to introduce SonarX's curated, indexed datasets from various blockchains to AWS Open Data program. These datasets will be easily accessible through AWS S3 buckets. SonarX will supervise the datasets using its Data Quality Framework to guarantee precision, coherence, and comprehensiveness. This move emphasizes the significance of accurate data, with AWS selecting SonarX for this venture. Check out the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Prince Harry pledges to continue fighting Rupert Murdoch's tabloids for phone hacking, citing the importance of accountability and upholding journalistic integrity. #Royal #MediaHacking
news.summary: A member of the British royal family has recently stated that their legal dispute with certain media outlets is centered around the principle of "accountability" and protecting the integrity of genuine journalism.

news.headline: Russel Metals (TSX: RUS) acquires Tampa Bay Steel. CEO John Reid expresses excitement for the addition to Southern US portfolio.
news.summary: Russel Metals Inc. (TSX: RUS) recently finalized the acquisition of Tampa Bay Steel, as disclosed on December 4, 2024. John Reid, the company's President and CEO, expressed enthusiasm about this development. The acquisition of Tampa Bay Steel aligns with Russel Metals' expansion plans in the Southern US region. This move signifies a significant advancement for the company in bolstering its presence and operations in the area.

news.headline: Global mosquito repellent market projected to increase by USD 4.16 billion from 2024-2028, driven by AI technology and awareness campaigns.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on market evolution, focusing on how it is driving transformation. The global market for mosquito repellent is expected to witness significant growth, with an estimated increase of USD 4.16 billion projected from 2024 to 2028. According to Technavio, the market is anticipated to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 6.4% during this period.

news.headline: Ultralife Corporation to present at Benchmark Company Investor Conference on December 11, 2024 in NYC. #InvestorConference #ULBI #NewYork
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Newark, New York, Ultralife Corporation (NASDAQ: ULBI) revealed its participation in The Benchmark Company’s 13th Annual Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference scheduled for December 11, 2024, at the New York Athletic Club in New York City.

news.headline: Utz Brands opens Rice Distribution Center in Hanover, PA with 650,000 square foot facility; named after Michael W. Rice.
news.summary: Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ), a prominent U.S. producer of branded salty snacks, has inaugurated the Rice Distribution Center in Hanover, Pennsylvania. Spanning 650,000 square feet, this modern logistics facility pays homage to Michael W. Rice, recognizing his 50 years of dedication to Utz. The center aims to streamline operations and enhance distribution efficiency for the company.

news.headline: Gregg Sengstack joins Allegion's board as the new member, making it a nine-member board including eight independent directors.
news.summary: Allegion plc, a prominent global security products and solutions provider listed on NYSE as ALLE, has welcomed Gregg Sengstack, the executive chairperson of Franklin Electric Company, Inc., to its Board of Directors. Sengstack's inclusion expands the Board to a total of nine members, with eight being independent directors. He will contribute to the Audit and Finance Committee, Compensation and Human Capital Committee, and the Corporate Governance and Nomination Committee.

news.headline: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) named to Newsweek's 2025 list of America's Most Responsible Companies, tops as highest-ranked homebuilder for 5th consecutive year.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, KB Home, a prominent homebuilder listed on NYSE as KBH, has been acknowledged as one of America's Most Responsible Companies for 2025 by Newsweek®. This marks the fifth consecutive year that KB Home has received this accolade, making it the top-ranked national homebuilder to achieve such recognition. The distinction is awarded by Newsweek in collaboration with Statista, a reputable source of market and consumer data, and is accessible on Newsweek's official website. The company expressed gratitude for the recognition, emphasizing their commitment to responsibility and positive relationships.

news.headline: Company finishes issuing $850M in zero-coupon convertible senior notes due in 2031.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global unemployment rate has increased to 6.7%, with a total of 200 million people around the world currently unemployed. The report also highlights that youth unemployment remains a critical issue, with 71 million individuals between the ages of 15-24 without a job. The COVID-19 pandemic has significantly impacted employment opportunities, leading to a surge in joblessness across various sectors. Experts emphasize the urgent need for governments to implement effective policies to address this concerning trend and support job creation initiatives to boost economic recovery on a global scale.

news.headline: Shepherd Ave Capital Acquisition Corp prices $75M IPO of 7.5M units at $10 each, trading as NASDAQ: SPHAU.
news.summary: A company based in Wilmington, Delaware, Shepherd Ave Capital Acquisition Corporation (NASDAQ: SPHAU), revealed the pricing details of its initial public offering on December 4, 2024. The offering consists of 7,500,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit, resulting in total gross proceeds amounting to $75,000,000.

news.headline: ROHM's EcoSiC tech in 3.5kW COSEL power supply units for up to 94% efficiency; HCA series mass produced since 2023, HFA series since 2024.
news.summary: ROHM Semiconductor has recently revealed that its EcoSiC™ products, specifically SiC MOSFETs and SiC Schottky barrier diodes (SBDs), have been integrated into COSEL's HFA/HCA series of 3.5kW output AC-DC power supply units for 3-phase applications. This move towards utilizing ROHM's SiC MOSFETs and SiC SBDs in these power supply units has resulted in a noteworthy efficiency rate of up to 94%. The HCA series, which started mass production in 2023, and the HFA series, which commenced production in 2024, have both benefited from the enhanced performance achieved through the incorporation of these advanced components.

news.headline: iCAD partners with Cascaid Health to provide AI-powered mammography to all patients, launching Q1 2025.
news.summary: ProFound Health has announced a virtual care partnership with Cascaid Health to provide AI-powered mammography services to all patients, starting in the first quarter of 2025. This initiative aims to democratize access to this technology, making it available to a wider audience.

news.headline: Galiano Gold ends gold purchase deal with Red Kite. Terminates off-take agreement. TSX: GAU, NYSE American: GAU.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, on December 4, 2024, Galiano Gold Inc. (TSX: GAU) (NYSE American: GAU) has officially ended its gold purchase and sale agreement with Red Kite Opportunities Master Fund Limited. This termination marks a significant decision by Galiano, a well-known Company in the industry. The specifics of the agreement, including important financial figures, were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: OGE Energy Corp names Charles Walworth CFO, Board declares quarterly dividend. OKLAHOMA CITY, Dec. 4, 2024. (NYSE: OGE)
news.summary: The quarterly dividend has been declared by the Board of Directors based in Oklahoma City on December 4, 2024. OGE Energy Corp. (NYSE: OGE), the parent organization of Oklahoma Gas and Electric Company, also disclosed the appointment of Charles Walworth as the new Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer, effective as of the same date.

news.headline: Patriot produces 307g sample of battery-grade lithium hydroxide from CV5 Spodumene Pegmatite in Australia.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Sydney, Australia, a significant achievement was made with the production of a 307-gram sample of marketable and on-specification battery-grade lithium hydroxide monohydrate product derived from the CV5 Spodumene Pegmatite deposit. This deposit serves as a crucial component for this milestone.

news.headline: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico reports 1.8% increase in passenger traffic in Nov 2024 compared to 2023.
news.summary: In Guadalajara, Mexico, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) has released preliminary data on terminal passenger traffic for November 2024. The company reported a comparison with November 2023. The announcement did not provide specific numerical details on the change in passenger traffic volume between the two periods.

news.headline: Jupiter Neurosciences, Inc. closes $11 million IPO, offering 2,750,000 shares at $4.00 per share on Nasdaq (JUNS).
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, Jupiter Neurosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: JUNS) completed its initial public offering by selling 2,750,000 shares of common stock at $4.00 per share. This resulted in gross proceeds of $11 million for the company, not accounting for underwriting discounts and additional expenses. Jupiter Neurosciences is a clinical stage pharmaceutical company focused on developing treatments for neuroinflammation using its proprietary product, JOTROL™.

news.headline: Google concerns over Israeli contract for military tech could put reputation at risk amid human rights worries.
news.summary: The major technology company, facing opposition from some employees over providing technology to Israel’s military, expressed concerns about potential harm to its reputation from the project.

news.headline: Teamsters filed charges against Costco for unfair labor practices violating federal law and labor agreement.
news.summary: A major wholesale retailer is facing scrutiny for engaging in unfair labor practices and blatantly disregarding a collective bargaining agreement. The Teamsters have taken action by filing numerous charges against Costco for violating federal labor law and the national guidelines. The incident took place in Washington on December 4, 2024. The wholesale giant is accused of failing to adhere to the agreed terms and conditions, leading to a breach of the collective bargaining agreement. The extent of the violations and the impact on the workforce remain under investigation.

news.headline: Crypto: BTC $97,718 +1.6%, ETH $3,838 +6%. Market recovers on Powell's 'digital gold' statement. Transactions rise. 400 new BTC whales.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets saw gains on Wednesday following remarks by Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell who labeled it as "digital gold." Prices for major cryptocurrencies were as follows: Bitcoin at $97,718 (+1.6%), Ethereum at $3,838 (+6.0%), Solana at $230.86 (-3.2%), Dogecoin at $0.4222 (+2.2%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00003057 (+6.2%). IntoTheBlock data indicated a 10% decrease in large transaction volume and a 0.3% drop in daily active addresses, while transactions over $100,000 surged from 12,355 to 13,081 in a day and exchanges netflows rose by 89.6%. Coinglass reported that 164,631 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours for a total of $419.58 million. Chart analyst Ali Martinez highlighted that approximately 400 new Bitcoin whales have entered the network over the past two weeks. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dow Jones crosses 45,000, S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit record highs, with a new IPO stock breaking out.
news.summary: On Wednesday afternoon, the major stock indexes were approaching record highs, with the Dow Jones surpassing 45,000. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq also achieved record closes. Additionally, a recent IPO stock demonstrated significant growth, breaking out and hitting new heights. This positive market performance was captured in live coverage reports.

news.headline: Dow Jones reaches high, bitcoin surges on Powell's remarks. Nvidia stock back in buy range. Ready for another run?
news.summary: Stock markets surged to record highs after Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell’s remarks, with major indexes including the Dow Jones posting remarkable gains. Alongside this bullish trend, bitcoin witnessed a significant leap in value. Additionally, Nvidia stocks have recovered and are now within a favorable buying range, prompting speculation on the potential for another strong rally. Investors are closely monitoring these developments for potential profitable opportunities.

news.headline: Costa Rica experiences significant growth in online searches across different sectors, showcasing its international presence.
news.summary: Recent findings from Bloom Consulting show a significant increase in online searches within various industries. The study, conducted in San José, Costa Rica, on December 5, 2024, highlights a surge in interest in the country. Costa Rica's digital presence has strengthened, indicating a positive trajectory.

news.headline: Motorola Solutions EVP & CTO, Mahesh Saptharishi, to join Barclays Global Technology Conference on Dec 11, 2024 at 9:15am PST. Live webcast available. NYSE: MSI.
news.summary: Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) revealed that Mahesh Saptharishi, Executive Vice President and CTO, is set to engage in a fireside chat at the upcoming Barclays Global Technology Conference on Wednesday, December 11, 2024, at 9:15 a.m. PST. The session will be available through a live webcast and replay on Motorola Solutions’ Investor Relations website at [website URL]. Motorola Solutions is a prominent company in the technology sector.

news.headline: Trump considering Ron DeSantis as Defense Secretary amid doubts about Pete Hegseth. Odds: DeSantis (28%), Hegseth (29%). Market payout $1 if approved by June 30, 2025. DeSantis trading at 49%, up from 28%. Users can bet with USDC.
news.summary: Pressure on Pete Hegseth, Donald Trump's pick for Defense Secretary, prompts consideration of Ron DeSantis as a backup choice. DeSantis, a former political rival, is being seen as a viable alternative to Hegseth due to concerns about the latter's qualifications and past remarks. Betting market on Polymarket shows current favorites:- DeSantis: 28%- Hegseth: 29%- Joni Ernst: 15%- Mike Waltz: 8%The market predicts the approved Defense Secretary by June 30, 2025, with a payout of $1 for the winner. DeSantis peaked at 49% on Wednesday, while Hegseth's odds dropped from 87% since November. Users can use USDC to deposit funds on Polymarket.

news.headline: Michelle Collins elected to Owens Corning Board; W. Howard Morris not seeking re-election. $OC.
news.summary: Toledo, Ohio - Owens Corning disclosed today that Michelle Collins, previously Vice Chair and Senior Audit Partner at Deloitte & Touche LLP, along with being the National Automotive Sector Leader, has been chosen as a new member for the company’s Board of Directors. Collins will be joining the Audit Committee and Finance Committee. Furthermore, W. Howard Morris has declared his decision to not seek re-election at the upcoming Annual Meeting of Stockholders. The company expressed their contentment in welcoming Collins aboard.

news.headline: GameAbove Entertainment names Matt Shepard as CEO, a renowned sports executive & broadcaster, on Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: In Fort Myers, Florida on December 4, 2024, GameAbove Entertainment revealed the selection of Matt Shepard as the company's latest Chief Executive Officer. Shepard, renowned for his achievements in sports management and broadcasting, joins with extensive experience and strong industry relationships.

news.headline: Dow surpasses 45,000, sparking review of market benchmarks.
